title: Santa Claus Plush Pillow Toy, 9in/23cm Father Xmas Stuffed Doll, Soft Toy Gift for Kids, Christmas Stocking Fillers, Winter Holiday Decor
features: 🎄【Petite and Cute】: Each plush doll about 9 inches/ 23 cm, incorporating these cute plush Santa Claus toys into your indoor holiday decorations can create a very strong winter atmosphere, very suitable for adding extra festive atmosphere to your seasonal decorations.
🎅【Fine Workmanship】: These Christmas plush dolls are made of PP cotton material, feel comfortable and skin friendly, and not easy to deform; the overall look rich texture, three-dimensional and chic.

☃️【Christmas Theme Design】: A total of 4 different styles of Christmas dolls, including Santa Claus, snowman, reindeer,xmas tree, they are full of Christmas vibes, cater to the Christmas theme and can easily create a joyful atmosphere, delicate and beautiful, easily draws the attention of people.

🦌【Versatile Decorations】: Easily fasten these Christmas Plush Dolls to your Christmas tree, fireplace, garlands, and more; They effortlessly spread holiday cheer wherever they're placed; Also, surprise loved ones with these plush doll ornaments as delightful stocking stuffers or charming gifts.

🎁【Warm Reminder】: Due to transportation needs, the Christmas plush decorations are vacuum packed and will be slightly deformed; After receiving the package, open it, pat and knead it hard, leave it for a period of time, or iron the surface with a steam iron at low temperature, as the plush toy will be very soft, and they will be back to normal soon.
description: Product description Features: If you are also looking for a suitable holiday gift for your family and friends, please don't miss these christmas stuffed toys with smiles on their faces, no one will refuse these adorable and sweet gifts The xmas plush doll can be served as exchange gifts, piñata fillers, stocking fillers, goodie bags fillers, classroom awards and so on, both boys and girls will love them. Specifications: Includes: 1Pcs christmas plush toy Material: PP cotton and quality plush Color: Christmas Tree/Santa Claus/Reindeer/Xmas Snowman,as picture show Size: about 23 cm/ 9 inch Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist a slight difference due to different screen displays. Safety Warning To be used under the direct supervision of an adult
